description.astral_mekanism.astral_machi: This is an order of magnitude machine that harnesses the power of the stars to achieve high speeds.
description.astral_mekanism.compact_mach: This machine combines multi-block machines into one block for easier handling.
description.astral_mekanism.am_generator: This is a high-level generator that can control the loading and unloading of energy and fuel.
description.astral_mekanism.essential_cr: expanded crafting table for advanced crafting.
description.astral_mekanism.glowstone_ne: This machine uses glowstone neutrons instead of solar neutrons, allowing it to process nuclear material regardless of the environment.
description.astral_mekanism.greenhouse: This machine performs farming internally and automatically supplies crops.
description.astral_mekanism.infuse_synth: This machine independently refines materials for the metallurgic infuser, contributing to an increase in the overall crafting speed.
description.astral_mekanism.item_unzippe: This machine can unzip compressed item.
description.astral_mekanism.mekanical_ch: This machine makes AE2 Charger compatible with the Mekanism system, making them easier to incorporate into automated crafting.
description.astral_mekanism.mekanical_in: This machine makes AE2 Inscriber compatible with the Mekanism system, making them easier to incorporate into automated crafting.
description.astral_mekanism.mekanical_tr: This machine makes AE2's liquid-based item processing compatible with the Mekanism system, making it easier to incorporate into automatic crafting.
description.astral_mekanism.universal_st: This is a large storage capacity that can hold a large amount of items, liquids, and chemicals.
description.astral_mekanism.item_sortabl: This is a universal storage solution with item sorting capabilities.
description.astral_mekanism.astral_diamo: A sturdy block that can withstand Wither attacks.
description.astral_mekanism.amethyst_ore:
Unrecorded ore that should only form in places outside the laws of this world.
Not found in nature.
description.astral_mekanism.certus_quart:
Ore that might exist on a planet somewhere in the distant universe.
Not found in nature.
description.astral_mekanism.netherite_or:
Ore that was likely mined by the former Piglin civilization.
Not found in nature.
explain.astral_mekanism.assemblicator_bo:
Show a recipe on JEI which is regitered on this machine.
You can register a recipe with JEI's '+' button.
explain.astral_mekanism.assemblicator_to:
If this torch doesn't lit, any recipe isn't registered on this machine.
You can register a recipe with JEI's '+' button.
upgrade.astral_mekanism.cobblestone_supp:
Supply Cobblestone to Machine's slots.
This only works if the target slot accepts cobblestone.
upgrade.astral_mekanism.water_supply.des:
Supply Water to Machine's fluid tanks.
This only works if the target tank accepts water.
upgrade.astral_mekanism.xp.description: Increase Xp Produced By AME's Energized Smelters.
upgrade.astral_mekanism.air_intake.descr:
Supply Air to Machine's gas tanks.
This only works if the target tank accepts air.
upgrade.astral_mekanism.hyper_speed.desc: Speed Upgrade for Antiprotonic Nucleosynthesizer, Compact SPS & Compact APT.
upgrade.astral_mekanism.stardust_speed.d: Speed Upgrade for Interstellar Antineutronic Matter Reconstruction Apparatus
upgrade.astral_mekanism.advanced_stone_g: Blocks mined by a Digital miner will be replaced with either stone or deepslate, regardless of the surrounding conditions or the Digital miner's settings.
